examples.text: I went to university and I studied public health and learned about the seriousness of the obesity epidemic, particularly among kids and adolescents in poor communities. [8] I've spent the last two decades trying to alleviate the problem.
examples.explanation: 我上大学时学习公共卫生，了解到肥胖流行的严重性，尤其在贫困社区的儿童和青少年中。[8] 过去二十年我一直在努力缓解这一问题。

reviewSessions.example_text: I went to university and I studied public health and learned about the seriousness of the obesity epidemic, particularly among kids and adolescents in poor communities. [8] I've spent the last two decades trying to alleviate the problem.
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案为空或无关，未体现 alleviate 的含义。
missing_points: 在例句中指努力缓解这一问题
